user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account VanArsdel Ltd. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 14:29 EST
Subject: Re: Re: QBR preparation Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with QBR preparation. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 08:46 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: VanArsdel Ltd QBR preparation

Just checking in on the QBR preparation proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 15:46 EST
Subject: Re: Re: QBR preparation Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about QBR preparation. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: QBR preparation Discussion - VanArsdel Ltd
Date: 2024-03-24
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into QBR preparation.

[00:05:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:10:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:15:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:19:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:22:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:26:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:29:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.

[00:32:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): On the QBR preparation front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:34:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.

[00:36:00] Karen Patel (VanArsdel Ltd): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.
